series_metadata.series_description: Work papers for annual report sent to the federal Health and Human Services Department, which includes information on hearing disposition related to Medicaid, Temporary Assistance to Needy Families, and Supplemental Nutritional Assistance Programs. Also, work papers for annual report FNS 366-B sent to the Department of Agriculture, which concerns food assistance hearings and intentional program violations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 90 days after prepped, imaged, indexed, and quality control of has been completed, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
